subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified beyond all mention and thought, befitteth the Lord of Utterance and the Manifestation of Mysteries, Who hath caused the verse to be revealed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر و فکر مالک اذکار و مظهر اسرار را لایق و سزاست که آیه نازل و
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @suffering and imprisonment, @high station of learning
